content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the workstream generation changes in bundle.rs, the expanded prompt template, new summary/dependency-graph/deferred-items rendering, and the broader fixture updates across CLI/service/reconciliation tests. All 1021 library tests pass, lib clippy is clean, formatting is clean. The stricter validation (requires description, bead_type, priority 1-3, at least one label, non-empty covered_by, and bidirectional acceptance coverage) is consistent with the updated LLM prompt instructions and thoroughly unit-tested. The cycle detection, topological ordering with BTreeSet for determinism, duplicate canonical-ID rejection, and alias-aware cross-workstream analysis all look correct. The removal of the covered_by auto-backfill in canonicalize_bundle is an intentional strictening aligned with the bead's bidirectional-coverage acceptance criterion, and tests cover the new rejection path. No critical, high, or material bugs found; implementation appears production-ready.

## Amendments

None.
